titleStmt.title: SII 26.487: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 487. (A.R. No. 463 of 1909.) ŚUTTAMALLI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of a Śiva temple on the bank of the Tāmraparaṇī river.
This inscription is also damaged and incomplete.

It starts with the statement that it is the order of Aṉavaratadānapperumāḷ. This is followed by a Sanskrit verse in Grantha script stating this was the order of the god Śaṁbhu of Vrīhivṛitti (i.e., Tirunelvēli). It goes on to state that the king, Vīrakēraḷa Kulaśēkaradēvar made, for the merit of his son, a gift of one paṅgu of land to the god Aṅguṇḍīśvaramuḍaiyār, stated to be an āśraya-liṅga of the god Śambhu of Vrīhivṛitti, in Mēl-Vēmba-nāḍu and 12 paṅgus of land to the Bhaṭṭas of Ubhayamārttāṇḍach-chaturvvēdīmaṅgalam for thier livelihood. The land is stated to lie in Kōḍanūr alias Kulaśēkharach-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam in Mēl-Vēmba-nāḍu. It seems that the gift made to the Bhaṭṭas was called taxfree mu(kta)-pradāna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . Aṉavaratadāṉaperumāḷ tirumukapaṭi
sarvaloka samutpattisthitisaṅhāra kāraṇam śāsa
namśāśvatam śambhoḥ śrīvrīhipṛtivāsinaḥ . Aradi ca
ṇḍeśvarājñeyam . melvempunāṭṭu nammāśrayaliṅgamā
na Aṅkuṇṭīśvaramuṭaiyār teṟkku lata nammakaṉār
vīrakeraḷa kulaśekaratevar nammakaṉār perāl vaitta
Ubhaya māttāṇḍaccatarrvvetimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷuk
ku jīvaṉattukku namma ca ttavarkkuppuṟam melvem
punāṭṭu koṭanūrāṉa kulacekharacca[ turvvetimaṅka] lattu
pa paṟṟil virapaāṇṭi 1 Ippereri mu Apā
ṭattil muṟikkuḷattavaṇaippaṟṟil taṅkaḷu pe ṉṉiraṇṭu
kkuppaṅku paṉṉiraṇṭum Aṅkuṇṭīśvaramuṭaiyārkup pa
ṅku Oṉṟum Ākappaṅku patiṉmuṉṟuk Ippaṅku Oṉṟukku peru
nilam Iraṇṭu māvāka nilam Oṉṟe Āṟumāvum Iṟaṅkala taricu
nilamāka nilam Araimāvum Āka nilam Oṉṟe Araimāvaraiyu
[śrī] ciṟupaṭi nilam Iraṇṭaraiye mūṉṟumāvum taṅkaḷukku
makaṉār kulacekharadevar cava muttapradāna Iṟaiyiṟu
kkak Olaippaṭi le Iṟaiyiliyāka tātu Innilattu
kkuc cippaṭi nilam Oru māvukkum māttāl Aṟukalamāka vanta nel
lu 6 pacāṉappāṭṭattukku pu muṉ pālāṇṭu Iṟukkuṅkālāle
variyilār kayyāl taravukoṇṭuṭu nama(ṅ)kovaṇavar vacam
l vaṟutava candrāityavat celluvatākak kallilum(ñ) cempi
lum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Aṉubhavittu potuka Aruḷāl brā
hmacakravatti Eḻuttu—
Digital edition of SII 26.487 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
